plugins.name: ember-claude-skills
plugins.description: EmberJS plugin for Claude Code: Octane fundamentals, routing, components, services, Ember Data, testing, ecosystem addons, TypeScript/Glint, the Polaris transition, plus version-specific skills and migrator agents covering Ember 2.x → 3.x → 4.x → 5.x.
